testcase.name: test_simple_failure

failure.message: AssertionError: This test should fail assert 1 == 2

testcase.failure: test_samples/pytest_failures.py:8: in test_simple_failure assert 1 == 2, "This test should fail" E AssertionError: This test should fail E assert 1 == 2

testcase.name: test_division_by_zero
testcase.failure: test_samples/pytest_failures.py:13: in test_division_by_zero result = 1 / 0 ^^^^^ E ZeroDivisionError: division by zero

testcase.name: test_attribute_error
testcase.failure: test_samples/pytest_failures.py:20: in test_attribute_error obj.some_attribute # This will raise AttributeError ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E AttributeError: 'NoneType' object has no attribute 'some_attribute' obj = None
